results.title: GAP DOWN incoming but will it sustain?
results.description: Following the global cues, we can expect NIFTY to open with big GAP down but we can see strong demand zone around 22800 and 22400 levels. Hence any signs of rejection around these levels can show strong short covering. However, if NIFTY manages to sustain itself above 22800 we might see 22400 in no time which is a next strong demand zone. So, plan your trades accordingly and keep watching everyone.

results.title: Armenia Concludes Pivotal Election with 59% Turnout
results.description: Armenia concluded voting in its high-stakes parliamentary election on Sunday, with the Central Election Commission reporting a final voter turnout of 58.97 percent when polls closed. The ballot serves as a crucial test for Prime Minister Nikol Pashinyan’s diplomatic pivot toward the West, which has drawn trade bans, cyber interference, and implicit military threats from Moscow. Pashinyan has framed the election as a choice between a durable peace treaty with Azerbaijan or a return to war.

results.title: Zelensky meets allies in UK after strike hits Ukraine nuclear site
results.description: Ukrainian President Zelensky meets UK, French, and German leaders in the UK for defense talks after new Russian strikes hit a nuclear site. Get the latest Read More: https://punchng.com/zelensky-meets-allies-in-uk-after-strike-hits-ukraine-nuclear-site/

results.title: Panchang Today, June 08, 2026: Krishan Paksh 8 (Ashtami), Satabhisaj, Shubh Muhurat, Rahu Kaal and more
results.description: June 08, 2026, a Monday, aligns with Krishna Paksha Ashtami and the Satabhisaj Nakshatra, encouraging discipline and truth-seeking. The day supports focused efforts, problem-solving, and spiritual introspection. Auspicious timings are available for various activities, while Rahu Kaal and other inauspicious periods advise caution. Kalashtami Vrat is observed, emphasizing courage and honesty.

results.title: Carlo Ancelotti’s Brazil suffers first pre-World Cup injury setback as Wesley is replaced by Man United’s Ederson
results.description: With Wesley being Brazil's first injury blow prior to the 2026 World Cup, head coach Carlo Ancelotti has decided to call-up Manchester United's next signing Ederson as his replacement.

results.title: Nancy Guthrie Case Latest Live Updates: Expert Says Digital ‘Reverse Search’ That Could Identify a Suspect as New Theory Emerges
results.description: More than four months after Nancy Guthrie disappeared in Tucson, investigators continue searching for answers. Experts say a digital trail, including address searches and GPS records, could provide the breakthrough needed for an arrest. The post Nancy Guthrie Case Latest Live Updates: Expert Says Digital ‘Reverse Search’ That Could Identify a Suspect as New Theory Emerges appeared first on The Sunday Guardian .

results.title: Doom: The Dark Ages | Revelations - Official Reveal Trailer | Xbox Games Showcase 2026
results.description: Doom: The Dark Ages | Revelations will arrive on July 7, 2026, as a brand-new campaign expansion that expands the Slayer's saga in a new way. Oh, and he'll have to ascend from the prison of his mind and fight and abomination of the gods to help his followers find the path to freedom.This expansion will feature deeper puzzles, new demons, and new mysterious alongside a deadly Chain Spear that rewards mastery with enhanced power and mobility. There will also be the addition of Ripatorium 3.0, adding DLC content (3 new maps, new demons, and fully upgraded new weapons) with deeper customization, improved pass code generation, and saving + loading presets.Wounded and betrayed, Slayer must face a ruthless purgatory while hunting for the truth of what is happening and trusting the help of a new mysterious ally.

results.title: New England 'Mrs Christmas' destroys her idyllic life after fight over ornamental CHICKENS erupted at $800,000 cottage
results.description: For more than 40 years, she welcomed thousands of people with a cheery smile to her award-winning Christmas tree farm. Then her move to a New Hampshire village went disastrously wrong.
